name: Pecan Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Unbaked regular size (not deep dish) pie crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, corn syrup, and melted butter in a medium-sized bowl.
2. Add beaten eggs and pecans to the sugar mixture.
3. Mix thoroughly.
4. Pour the mixture into the pie shell.
5. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 45-50 minutes.
6. Cool on a rack.
Serves 8
Courtesy of Dale & Gail Shipp, Columbia, MD.
